channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
item.description: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

item.title: Judge sides with creators of banned ICE trackers who allege DHS and DOJ violated their First Amendment rights
item.description: A judge has granted the makers of the "ICE Sightings - Chicagoland" Facebook group and the Eyes Up app a preliminary injunction to stop the Trump administration from coercing platforms to take these projects down. Judge Jorge L. Alonso of the United States District Court for the Northern District of Illinois found that the plaintiffs, Kassandra Rosado and Kreisau Group, are likely to succeed in their case, which alleges that the government suppressed protected speech under the First Amendment by strong-arming Facebook and Apple into removing ICE monitoring efforts. Both Eyes Up and ICE Sighti...

item.title: I took the DJI Pocket 4 vlogging camera traveling — it's a polished successor to the wildly popular Pocket 3
item.description: DJI's latest compact vlogging camera improves on its already capable predecessor with better battery life, built-in memory, new accessories, professional color profiles and 4K video now up to 240fps.

item.title: 'An impressive leap': Artemis II used lasers to communicate 100000x faster than the Apollo 13 mission
item.description: Laser communication systems on Artemis II promise extreme data speeds compared to Apollo era radios, but still face environmental limitations.

item.title: Samsungs limited run Galaxy Z TriFold is all sold out
item.description: If you didn't buy a Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold, you may have missed your window entirely.

item.title: At BookCon 2026, Heated Rivalry author Rachel Reid and show creator Jacob Tierney sit down to talk about instant chemistry and whats next for the show
item.description: Fans of 'Heated Rivalry" filled the seats of BookCon 2026 to hear the show creator, Jacob Tierney, speak with Rachel Reid, the author whose books inspired the hit series.

item.title: L’énorme incendie chez BYD, la 1ère Volkswagen électrique à 25 000 € et batterie solaire Anker Solix – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été dense cette semaine : de l’incendie du siège de BYD à la révolution annoncée chez Volkswagen, en passant par les innovations d’Anker et Mercedes-Benz. Voici le récapitulatif des contenus les plus lus de la semaine.

item.title: How to watch WrestleMania 42: WWE live streams, TV channels and preview
item.description: All the ways to watch WrestleMania 42 live streams online, with the blockbuster Brock Lesnar vs Oba Femi showdown set to light up Allegiant Stadium, Nevada.

item.title: I signed up to a YouTube Premium free trial, and it was annoyingly brilliant — but there’s one setback that’s keeping me from returning
item.description: I caved to YouTube Premium's free trial and now I see what the hype is all about, but I can't get past its poor queuing system.

item.title: Apple avoids a second import ban for its redesigned smartwatches in latest court ruling
item.description: Apple has secured a major victory for its redesigned smartwatches as per the latest decision from the US International Trade Commission. The federal agency ruled against reinstating an import ban on Apple Watches, allowing the tech giant to continue selling its devices with a reworked blood-oxygen monitoring technology. The ITC decided to terminate the case and refer to a preliminary ruling from one of its judges in March that claimed that Apple's redesigned smartwatches don't infringe on patents held by Masimo, the medical tech company that has long been embroiled in lawsuits surrounding the ...
